ranked_gaps.description: 1 pairs of openers across same-user sessions had >=0.65 structural similarity.

examples.a_raw: Hi Neha, I'm Miss Maya. Honestly, the first sip of cardamom chai in monsoon mornings makes my whole week. What’s on your mind today?
examples.b_raw: Hi Neha, I'm Miss Maya. Honestly, the first sip of cardamom chai in monsoon mornings makes my whole week. How was your day?

ranked_gaps.suggested_fix: Add a deterministic first-turn similarity check that strips opener if normalized form matches one of the last 6 stored opening_phrases by SequenceMatcher >= 0.7.

ranked_gaps.description: On returning-user sessions, average memory-reference rate is 12% — too low. Maya is ignoring stored facts/events.
ranked_gaps.suggested_fix: Renderer: surface the highest-priority anticipation_queue item more prominently. Prompt: tighten Rule 31 to require referencing one stored item every 3rd turn at minimum.

ranked_gaps.description: Maya included 2+ questions in 14 replies across 6 sessions (Rule 9 violation).

examples.snippet: Hi Priyansh, fixed a bug today? Work wins feel great. How did it go?
Dramas with a message always stay with you, don’t they? Aamir Khan’s old films are classics for a reason. "Dil Bechara" sounds emotional — did you listen to the songs after the movie?
"Got it — secure and fast gateways are tricky. Did the team break it into smaller parts? The movie sounds fun — who’s coming?"

ranked_gaps.suggested_fix: Sharpen Rule 9 with 'NEVER more than ONE question mark per reply'. Optionally a guard that drops trailing questions when count>1.

ranked_gaps.description: Maya used the stale phrase tagged 'hindi_songs_persona_cycle' in 4/15 sessions (26.7%).

examples.snippet: Hi Priyansh, I'm Miss Maya. Honestly, old Hindi songs make my day when I'm driving. Did you have a good day?
"Got it — Arijit, Lata, and cricket make the perfect evening mix. I lean toward old Hindi songs too. What’s your go-to track when you want to just chill?"
"Lata’s 'Ye hai to yehi' is a classic for a reason — timeless peace. I like old Hindi songs too. Any old rock song you’d recommend?"
